# Gian Trotta — Web Developer, Cleveland OH

> Gian Trotta is a senior software engineer in Cleveland, Ohio who builds and rescues websites
> for Northeast Ohio small businesses: migrations off Wix/Squarespace, new builds, site audits
> ("Site Checkup"), and monthly care plans. Sites are fast (100/100 speed scores), visible to
> Google and AI assistants, and carry no monthly platform fees.

## Pages

- [Services](https://giantrotta.dev/services/): Website Rescue, New Website Build, Site Checkup, Care Plan
- [Case studies](https://giantrotta.dev/case-studies/): before/after rescues with real numbers
- [About](https://giantrotta.dev/about/): background and approach
- [Contact](https://giantrotta.dev/contact/): project form and booking

## Contact

- Email: giantrotta24@gmail.com
- Area served: Cleveland and Northeast Ohio (remote-friendly)
